name: revivalside
description: Local CounterSide revival server research tooling.

scripts.check:listener: node --check cs-listener.js && node --check server/listener.js && node --check server/packetHandlerLoader.js
scripts.check:handlers: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-ChildItem packet-handlers,modules -Recurse -Filter *.js | Where-Object { $_.DirectoryName -match '[\\/]handlers$' } | ForEach-Object { node --check $_.FullName }"
